{
  dbo_UserSearch_active.sql:
-- <auto-generated>
--   This file was generated by DbProcGen.
--   Any changes to this file will be overwritten on next generation.
-- </auto-generated>

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[UserSearch_active]
    @SearchTerm nvarchar(100),
    @IncludeInactive bit
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Worker procedure for route: ActiveUsers
    -- Conditions: StatusAxis = 'Active'
    -- Specialized implementation for this parameter combination

    SELECT
        CAST(NULL AS int) AS [UserId],
        CAST(NULL AS nvarchar(256)) AS [Email],
        CAST(NULL AS bit) AS [IsActive]
    WHERE 1 = 0;
END
GO
,
  dbo_UserSearch_all.sql:
-- <auto-generated>
--   This file was generated by DbProcGen.
--   Any changes to this file will be overwritten on next generation.
-- </auto-generated>

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[UserSearch_all]
    @SearchTerm nvarchar(100),
    @IncludeInactive bit
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Worker procedure for route: AllUsers
    -- Conditions: StatusAxis = 'All'
    -- Specialized implementation for this parameter combination

    SELECT
        CAST(NULL AS int) AS [UserId],
        CAST(NULL AS nvarchar(256)) AS [Email],
        CAST(NULL AS bit) AS [IsActive]
    WHERE 1 = 0;
END
GO

}
